utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 sections with details. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes type, location, features, price, fees, total cost—adequate. 2) financing: provides method (cash), terms/context (equity, credit score, closing date)—adequate. 3) legal_services: firm, scope, cost, timeline—adequate. 4) moving_services: company, services, cost, timeline—adequate. 5) setup_services: utilities setup with services, cost, discounts, timeline; also property_survey with company, services, cost, timeline—adequate. 6) total_budget: itemized costs and grand total—adequate. All items present and fully specified.
